title: Apparatus and system for vertical string greenery
abstract: Disclosed herein a modular apparatus for vertical string garden and system thereof, wherein system comprising plurality of modular planters detachably connected to each other and each of said containers including a receiving portion that is adapted to receive a multiple plants, and each container is detachably connected to three side hanging string from top and a joinery mechanism is having a lock system which adapted to provide secure installation to the modular planters as well as enabling easy detachable from the system. The planter is designed in a manner to provide better strength and wherein the same is fitted or removed from the system are independent to any support members.
claims:
Claims We Claim: 1 . A modular apparatus for vertical string garden, the modular apparatus is adapted to mount in a vertical string garden independent to any support system, wherein said apparatus comprising: a planting container having spherical wall structure designed to protect maximum surface area from exposure to environmental forces; an inbuilt irrigation channel extending from 3 sides which adapted to provide to provide enable end to end in the including an opening; a water reservoir and a drain pit at the bottom of the planter positioned centrally with the reservoir which play dual role to provide strength to the planter as well as water reservoir in absence of water in the reservoir; a joinery mechanism having locking slots designed to secure the planting containers, wherein said planting containers are hanging from top by employing 3 side wire rope arrangement which enable fitting and removal of the containers independent to any support members. 2. The modular apparatus for vertical string garden as claimed in claim 1 , wherein said water reservoir is of optimum size and adapted to maintain root zone temperature, hold moisture required by plants, enable oxygenation of root zone. 3. The modular apparatus for vertical string garden as claimed in claim 1 , wherein said water reservoir is capable of holding more than 85 ml of water per planting cavity. 4. The modular apparatus for vertical string garden as claimed in claim 1 , wherein said water reservoir is capable of providing thermal insulating effect. 5. The modular apparatus for vertical string garden as claimed in claim 1 , wherein said planters are adapted of planting up to 5 plants or more. 6. The modular apparatus for vertical string garden as claimed in claim 1 , wherein the surface of the container is having ribs and curvatures to strengthen the module by spreading the wind load on the surface and hence providing strength and sustenance to high wind velocity, shock. 7. The modular apparatus for vertical string garden as claimed in claim 1 , wherein 

 container is having color edge at lower base to help in fixing a led strip and provide further strength. 8. The modular apparatus for vertical string garden as claimed in claim 1 , wherein the planting container is having separate zone of growing media and the water reservoir. 9. The modular apparatus for vertical string garden as claimed in claim 7, wherein said growing media and reservoir is separated employing a bio blanket, consisting recycled synthetic fibers and renewable organic fibers that provide strength, longevity and grip to the root zone. 10. A modular string garden system comprising: a plurality of modular planters detachably connected to each other and each of said containers including a receiving portion that is adapted to receive a multiple plants, and each container is detachably connected to three side hanging string from top; an irrigation channel is inbuilt in the system including a plurality of water dispensing units enabling homogenous misting and illumination units adapted to function ornamental as well as grow light; a joinery mechanism is having a lock system which adapted to provide secure installation to the modular planters as well as enabling easy detachable from the system, wherein said planters fitted or removed from the system are independent to any support members. 1 1 . The system as claimed in claim 10, wherein said system is having series of vertical modular planting container securely mounted over the string. 12. The system as claimed in claim 10, wherein said system is having inbuilt irrigation system providing irrigation, drain and illumination. 13. The system as claimed in claim 12, wherein said illumination plays a dual role of ornamental light as well as grow light. 14. The system as claimed in claim 10, wherein said system enable to grow broader plants palate and many hardy plant varieties. 15. The system as claimed in claim 10, wherein said system is employing sustainable growth media which enable to provide required the space for white roots, ensures the rate of 

 drain within the stipulated parameters. 16. The system as claimed in claim 10, wherein water used in the irrigation system is recycled and reused.
